HERO.TITLE: Manage your veterinary clinic simply and efficiently

HOW_IT_WORKS.TITLE: Everything you need in one system
HOW_IT_WORKS.SUBTITLE: Designed for veterinarians looking to optimize their time and improve care.
HOW_IT_WORKS.HERO_SUBTITLE: Simplifying veterinary work with modern, intuitive tools accessible from any device.
HOW_IT_WORKS.PROCESS_SUBTITLE: A flow designed to help you optimize your clinic from day one.
HOW_IT_WORKS.STEP1_DESC: Create complete digital records for each pet in seconds.
HOW_IT_WORKS.STEP2_DESC: Organize your schedule with a clear, error-free calendar.
HOW_IT_WORKS.STEP3_DESC: Record diagnoses using a structured SOAP format.
HOW_IT_WORKS.STEP4_DESC: Receive alerts for vaccines, treatments and follow-ups.
HOW_IT_WORKS.FEATURES_SUBTITLE: Tools designed specifically for daily veterinary work.
HOW_IT_WORKS.FEATURE1_DESC: All medical information in one place.
HOW_IT_WORKS.FEATURE2_DESC: Avoid conflicts and improve your daily organization.
HOW_IT_WORKS.FEATURE3_DESC: Never forget a vaccine or treatment.
HOW_IT_WORKS.TESTIMONIAL: "Since we started using VetCare, we reduced administrative time and improved care for our patients."
HOW_IT_WORKS.CTA_SUBTITLE: Join hundreds of clinics already managing their work with VetCare.

ABOUT.TITLE: Transforming veterinary management
ABOUT.SUBTITLE: Innovation at the service of animal care.
ABOUT.about_card_content: Optimize clinic management through accessible and intuitive technology.
ABOUT.MISSION_TEXT: To optimize clinic management through accessible technology so veterinarians can focus on what matters most: their patients.
ABOUT.VISION_TEXT: To be the leading platform for digital veterinary solutions in Latin America.
ABOUT.VALUE1_DESCRIPTION: We seek modern solutions that transform veterinary practice.
ABOUT.VALUE2_DESCRIPTION: We reduce operational times so you can serve more and better.
ABOUT.VALUE3_DESCRIPTION: We protect your patients' information with the highest standards.
ABOUT.VALUE4_DESCRIPTION: Intuitive interfaces designed for daily veterinary work.
ABOUT.PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION: VetCare is a comprehensive platform for veterinary clinics that centralizes patient management, appointments, and clinical records.
ABOUT.TEAM_DESCRIPTION: A team focused on technology and animal health.
ABOUT.TEAM_SUBTITLE: A talented team focused on innovation and animal care.
ABOUT.TEAM_MEMBER1_BIO: Specialists in software for the veterinary sector.
ABOUT.TEAM_MEMBER2_BIO: Experience designers focused on clinical usability.
ABOUT.TEAM_MEMBER3_BIO: Strategy and growth for the veterinary sector.

FOOTER.ABOUT_TEXT: VetCare simplifies veterinary management with intuitive digital tools so professionals can focus on animal care.
FOOTER.NEWSLETTER_TEXT: Stay updated with the latest VetCare news and veterinary management trends.
